headline: Is CoStar Group, Inc. (CSGP) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CSGP a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on CoStar Group, Inc. on r/ValueInvesting by WarmFaithlessness946. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CSGP. CoStar Group, Inc.’s share was trading at $30.12 as of June 18th. CSGP’s trailing and forward P/E were 430.29 and 18.94 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: Is CBRE Group Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: CBRE Group stock has trailed behind the Dow Jones Index’s returns over the past year, but analysts are upbeat about the real estate stock.
